channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: The three clocks of the Iran war
item.description: Trump is racing against the midterms, Iran is betting on endurance, and Netanyahu needs a war with no end.

item.title: The Iran war has exposed the limits of neutrality
item.description: From Gulf energy shocks to divisions among allies, the conflict has made strategic ambiguity harder to sustain.

item.title: Could the Lebanon ceasefire lead to US-Iran talks breakthrough?
item.description: Al Jazeera's Tohid Asadi discusses the prospect that the ceasefire in Lebanon could lead to a US-Iran peace deal.

item.title: Lebanese return to devastated south as fragile 10-day truce takes hold
item.description: Hezbollah warns it has its 'finger on the trigger' in case of Israeli violations of the temporary ceasefire.

item.title: Australia scrambles to secure energy as war on Iran fuels uncertainty
item.description: Heavily dependent on imported oil, Australia looks for quick fixes from regional diplomacy to free train rides.

item.title: Iran war’s big winners: Wall Street, weapons firms, AI and green energy
item.description: The global economic outlook for 2026 looks grim if the Iran war continues, but some industries are booming.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 49 of the US-Iran conflict?
item.description: Celebrations in Lebanon as a 10-day ceasefire begins, opening the door to talks on a longer-term Israel-Lebanon deal.

item.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
item.description: A 10-day truce between the two countries is now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support, as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.

item.title: Iranian footballers say Australia has given them 'hope' for safe future
item.description: The duo had sought aslyum after their football team did not sing the national anthem during a match.

item.title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online posts about school shootings
item.description: At least 16 people were injured in a shooting at a high school on Tuesday, before another nine were killed in a separate school shooting on Wednesday.
